title: Lord of the Rings Kings Addon
description: An Addon for the LOTR legacy mod to improve server gameplay.
body:
LOTR: legacy is a mod that brings middle earth into minecraft 1.7.10.

This Addon makes several adjustmenets in a piece-meal fashion that can improve gameplay and add some vanilla items back into the game via new crafting recipes.

There are 3 modules at the moment with 1 more planned.

1. Crafting Recipe Tweaks:
   This mod adds new recipes for nether quartz, redstone dust, and enchanted books.
  - Nether Quartz is craftable with 4 sand and 1 salt. ( returns 4 quartz )
  - Restone dust is crafted using 1 bronze and 1 glowstone dust. ( returns 2 redstone )
  - Enchanted books are crafted using max tier scrolls of the same kind. ( Example: unbreaking 3 can be crafted with 3 enduring scrolls, efficiency 5 can be crafted with 5 masterful scrolls )
    - Enchantments supported are: Unbreaking III, Efficiency V, Fortune III, Protection IV, Fire Protection IV, Feather Falling IV, Projectile Protection IV, Fire aspect 2, Power V, Punch 2, Knockback 2, Sharpness V, Looting III. 
    - Each recipe can be enabled and disabled in the config. Some enchantment recipes are disabled by default (based on my preferences). Currently Fortune and Looting are exclusive and cannot both be enabled ( defaults to fortune ).
    - This module may be run server side only by enabling the "server-only" config. . . 
  
2. Per Player Mob Cap:
   A Module is added that allows the server to change mob spawning algorithms to operate per-player instead of being server wide. It also allows for the number of mobs expected per player to be adjusted in config. 
   Defaults are set to match base mod experience.
   Mob spawning algorithm is adjusted for Middle earth and Utumno. Does not affect passive mob spawning, only LotrNPCs. 
   This module may be run Server-side only. ( no additional config necessary )

3. More Money:
   A module is added that allows for higher coin denominations to be gotten through the coin exchange system. Currently adds 1k, 10k and 100k coins.
   
   This module is server-client required. If you are running this mod server-only. Disable this module in the config.


Running Server only:
This is sprinkled above but just to be explicit. If you are running this mod server-side and not client side. . . adjust the following config:

1. In the crafting module, set server-side to "true"
2. In the more money module, set enabled to "false"
3. If the server was running, restart the server.
